title: Commit message generator
description: Read staged diff, propose a Conventional Commits message.
bodyPreview:
Generate a conventional-commits message for the staged diff below.

Diff:
!`git diff --cached`

User context: $ARGUMENTS

title: Code review (one file)
description: Review one file. Focus on correctness + perf.
bodyPreview:
Review $ARGUMENTS for correctness, performance, naming.
- Flag incorrect error handling.
- Flag blocking sync calls in async contexts.
- Suggest fixes inline.

title: Compare two paths
bodyPreview:
Compare $0 against $1. Summarize:
1. Structural diffs.
2. User-visible behavior diffs.
3. Which to ship and why.

title: Branch summary
description: Inline shell: summarize current branch commits.
bodyPreview:
Branch: !`git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD`

Last 10:
!`git log -10 --oneline`

Summarize the branch and what's still in flight. Focus: $ARGUMENTS

title: Skill explainer (env-aware)
bodyPreview:
Skill: $ARGUMENTS

Load ${CLAUDE_SKILL_DIR}/$ARGUMENTS/SKILL.md if present.
Explain:
- What it does (1 paragraph).
- When NOT to use it.
- The #1 gotcha.

title: Test failure triage
description: Shell block — pull failures and triage them.
bodyPreview:
Triage failing tests.

```!
swift test 2>&1 | grep -E '(✘|FAIL)' | head -20
```

For each: propose the smallest honest fix.

title: Refactor sketch
description: Read a file, propose a refactor plan.
bodyPreview:
Target: $ARGUMENTS

Propose a refactor:
1. Top 3 code smells (with justification).
2. Target shape (function signatures only).
3. Migration plan that stays green.

No code — just the plan.

title: Postmortem from logs
bodyPreview:
Window: $0 → $1 (UTC).

!`log show --start "$0" --end "$1" --info`

Answer:
1. What went wrong?
2. Why did checks miss it?
3. One change to prevent recurrence?
